note_text:
Pt seen for wound eval. Venous Right lower leg measures aprx 3.9 x 3.8cm, depth 0.7cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 2.3x2.3, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
Wound note - Rightlowerle. Meas 3.9x3.8x0.7cm. Mod serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 38% gran, 62% slough. Periwound erythematous. Alginate dsg applied. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Bergstrom notified.
